seo.title: The Space - Bar, Patio and Venue | Miss B's Coconut Club Mission Beach
seo.description: Explore Miss B's Coconut Club in Mission Beach San Diego. An open-air bar, tropical dining room, fire pit patio, and private event space at 3704 Mission Blvd.

hero.imageAlt: Miss B's Coconut Club teal open-air bar Mission Beach San Diego
hero.eyebrow: 3704 Mission Blvd · Mission Beach, San Diego
hero.heading: The Space
hero.subheading: An open-air bar, tropical dining room, fire pit patio, and private event venue at 3704 Mission Blvd, steps from the Pacific.

sections.imageAlt: Miss B's Coconut Club open-air teal bar window Mission Beach San Diego
sections.heading: The Open-Air Bar
body: The centerpiece of Miss B's is the open-air teal bar — a roll-up window that opens the kitchen directly onto the patio, with herringbone tile, copper fixtures, and a full draft system of flamingo tap handles.
Walk-ins always welcome at the bar. The full cocktail menu, beer program, and kitchen are available from open to close.

sections.imageAlt: Miss B's Coconut Club tropical dining room mural Mission Beach San Diego
sections.heading:
The Tropical
Dining Room
body: Inside Miss B's is a full tropical dining room — teal booth seating, the original Miss B's mural, hanging plants from the ceiling, and warm pendant lighting. It's the kind of room that makes a Tuesday feel like a vacation.
Available for private dining and full room buyouts. Seats up to 60 guests.

sections.imageAlt: Miss B's Coconut Club outdoor patio pink umbrellas Mission Beach San Diego
sections.heading: The Outdoor Patio
body: The outdoor patio at Miss B's is one of Mission Beach's most coveted spots. Pink fringed umbrellas, fire pit seating, and the open-air bar all visible from the street. Designed for groups, long afternoons, and people who don't want to go home.
Available for full patio buyouts. Accommodates up to 80 guests reception-style.

taps.imageAlt: Miss B's Coconut Club copper flamingo tap handles Mission Beach
taps.heading:
24 Taps.
All Flamingo.
taps.body: Miss B's signature copper flamingo tap handles are the bar's most photographed feature. 24 taps, all flamingo, all the time.
